description: Designed White House announcement card built around an Oval Office photograph. The upper two-thirds is a full-color photo of Donald Trump seated at the Resolute Desk holding up a signed document toward the camera, flanked by a group of adults and children in athletic gear; behind them are the American flag, military service flags, and presidential decor. The children wear navy and red athletic shirts (some with a shield-and-eagle crest), and the adults include several officials; the visible document reads 'PRESIDENTIAL FITNESS AWARD.' The lower third overlays text on a dark gradient: a small tan label 'PRESIDENTIAL ACTIONS,' then a bold white serif headline 'President Trump Signs Proclamation Revitalizing Presidental Fitness Test Award, Youth Sports and Fitness' ('Presidental' is spelled that way on the graphic), with the small white line-art White House emblem and 'The WHITE HOUSE' wordmark at the bottom.
notable_text: PRESIDENTIAL ACTIONS | President Trump Signs Proclamation Revitalizing Presidental Fitness Test Award, Youth Sports and Fitness | PRESIDENTIAL FITNESS AWARD | The WHITE HOUSE
